hooks.command: python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" session-start || python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" session-start || py -3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" session-start
python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" prompt || python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" prompt || py -3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" prompt
python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" pre-tool || python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" pre-tool || py -3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" pre-tool
python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" post-tool || python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" post-tool || py -3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" post-tool

python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" post-tool-failure || python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" post-tool-failure || py -3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" post-tool-failure
python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" subagent-start || python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" subagent-start || py -3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" subagent-start
python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" stop || python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" stop || py -3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" stop
python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" stop || python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" stop || py -3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" stop

python "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" instructions-loaded || python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" instructions-loaded || py -3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/runtime/bro_hook.py" instructions-loaded
